name: Rungs
description: Ladder rungs stacked across the cell, turning upright or flat on each seed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 0 14%, var(--color0) 14% 28%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
